summary: Successor epoch after three consecutive post-advance no-advance wakes. Reassessment replaced repeated matched-control mean/pin search with direct downside-barrier hazard, absolute non-collapse, tail-quality, and mechanism-specificity evidence before option pricing. The first exact recent-five-session downside-shock timer was exercised and closed at F0; the epoch remains active for materially distinct absolute-tail mechanisms.
mechanism_lane: direct downside-tail hazard and stand-aside discovery for capital-fit defined-risk income expressions
primary_evidence_class: lag-safe train-first direct close-barrier and worst-decile outcomes with date-blocked uncertainty, mechanism-specificity controls, and sealed chronological holdout

discovery_bar.purpose: Signal-only progress for F0→F1 and F1→F2 on labeled proxy or claim-appropriate data
required: direct absolute adverse-event endpoint aligned to payoff risk
train before untouched holdout when claiming F2
discovery_bar.notes: Discovery survivors are L0 research signals only. Close-only barriers are lower fidelity than intraday lows or option marks. Relative hazard separation cannot substitute for an absolute non-collapse gate.

capital_seat_bar.purpose: L1 sim edge / paper-path eligibility for the $3k sleeve
required: defined-risk preferred or explicit worst-case bound fitting sleeve
non-vacuous after-cost edge on dual cost axes
B3 density / multi-regime evidence appropriate to claim
competitive max-loss and window DD versus absolute gates
proxy-only or underlying-only evidence cannot earn L1

ken_soft_research_prior.text: Prefer exploring small repeatable profits from time decay and price swings while preserving a positive long-term directional bias; symbols and structures remain evidence-selected and capital-fit.

prior_epoch.disposition: The breakout underlying signal reached F2/L0, but its fixed bull-call option expression closed; two subsequent distinct mechanisms also closed, producing the three-no-advance burst stop resolved by this reassessment.

epoch_success_definition: Advance at least one materially distinct direct-tail candidate from F0_MECHANISM to F1_TRAIN under predeclared absolute-hazard, tail, dependence-aware uncertainty, and specificity gates, or close each exact mechanism without spending its holdout or option stage. No L1 or capital seat follows from underlying-only evidence.

closed_family_from_first_experiment.reason: Eligible close-barrier breach rate was 27.0073% versus the <=10% gate, and the stale six-to-ten-session diagnostic edge exceeded the recent-five-session edge.
closed_family_from_first_experiment.reopen_requires: A genuinely new economic mechanism or independent evidence class; do not churn nearby shock thresholds, recent-window lengths, barrier ceilings, or panels.

do_not: reopen the exact recent-five-session downside-shock timer through threshold, window, barrier, or panel churn
silently relabel a closed plain-HV or mean-return selector as downside-tail evidence
treat present-day panel history as survivorship-free or point-in-time universe selection
treat overlapping recent/stale shock partitions as a pure alternative-mechanism randomized comparison
represent a close-only barrier as an intraday low, option mark, executable stop, or managed option PnL
treat capability-only completion as strategy progress
promote underlying-only or proxy-only evidence to L1, capital seat, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live authority
notes: Epoch counters are scoped to started_stamp. The prior three-wake burst stop is cleared by the completed reassessment, but the new epoch now has one no-advance wake.
The present-day mega-cap/technology panel plus SMCI has survivorship and listing-history bias.
The stale and recent shock flags can overlap; their edge comparison is a confounded timing-specificity diagnostic, not a pure RCT.
The current circular-block bootstrap resamples pooled group vectors separately; future claims should prefer multi-symbol date-blocked uncertainty.
No living L1 capital-seat leader exists.
